risks.risk: Evidence run IDs can become stale after PR body edits.
risks.mitigation: Render PR evidence from .codex/evidence-pack.json and run placeholder/freshness validators.

risks.risk: Manual gate approval evidence is not durable production storage.
risks.mitigation: Keep production-like apply fail-closed and require approved manual gate records.

risks.risk: Local forge remains unavailable on this workstation.
risks.mitigation: GitHub contracts CI remains required before merge.
